scripts.lint: cd app && npm run lint && cd ../ui && npm run lint
scripts.test: cd app && npm run test && cd ../ui && npm run test -- --run
scripts.test:coverage: cd app && npx vitest run --coverage && cd ../ui && npx vitest run --coverage

app/**/*.{js,ts}: bash -c "cd app && if npm run typecheck --if-present; then echo ''; else echo 'No typecheck script'; fi"
ui/**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}: bash -c "cd ui && if npm run typecheck --if-present; then echo ''; else echo 'No typecheck script'; fi"
